description: The `@.` contextual sigil in an attribute value OUTSIDE any `<each>` body scope fires E-SYNTAX-064 (§17.7.3).
rationale: §17.7.3 normative: `@.` SHALL resolve to the current iteration value of the most-locally-enclosing `<each>` body scope, and `@.` outside any `<each>` body scope SHALL be E-SYNTAX-064 ('the `@.` contextual sigil is only legal inside an `<each>` body scope', wired S157 Bug 70). Here `<a href=@.email>` sits in plain markup with no enclosing `<each>`, so the sigil has no referent.
